calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Set For Trial On May-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ryan Lapine of Rosenfeld Meyer & Susman (310-246-3209) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Gregg A. Thornton of Selman Breitman LLP (415-979-0400) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL, TRANSGENDER PRIDE CELEBRATION COMMITTEE, INC.'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Defendant fails to show that plaintiff's complaint implicates CCP 425.16. Plaintiff alleges that defendant's lack of security at its celebration caused his injuries from gun shots. Plaintiff is not basing liability on defendant's constitutional free speech . (CCP 425.16(e); Rand Res., LLC v. City of Carson (2016) 247 Cal.App.4th 1080, 1091.) I also DENY plaintiff's request for attorneys' fees. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jun-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RYAN LAPINE OF THE ROSENFELD MEYER & SUSMAN, TEL. NO. 1-310-858-7700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DANIELLE K. LEWIS OF THE SELMAN BREITMAN LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-979-0400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction is taken under submission by Judge Quinn. The parties' objections to evidence are sustained in part and overruled in part as set out in the separate orders to be signed by the Judge. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
